title.en: The end of the world, a deeper area, will not h...

content.en:
The end of the world, a deeper area, will not have any effect on fighting here.

The Black Emperor Ancestor and the Selfless True Ancestor all came here, while the Ten Elements Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, and the Realm Ancestor were all here to watch the battle.

Rumble!!!!

The Black Emperor Ancestor's body erupted with the aura of being in control beyond the Ten Realms, and he directly punched him, shattering this piece of time and space.

The power of this blow is enough to bombard any Ten Realm-level Controller, and this is the strength that surpasses the Ten Realm-level Masters.

However.

The Selfless True Ancestor only lightly blocked, and the Black Emperor Ancestor's attack was directly dissolved, without causing any damage to the Selfless True Ancestor.

"How is it possible, how can my attack not pose any threat to you?"

The Black Emperor Ancestor was shocked.

Then, he struck again and again, but each attack was turned into nothingness by the Selfless True Ancestor.

"Black Emperor Ancestor, I can disperse any attack that does not surpass me to hundreds of millions of time and space, and directly wear it away, so that the attack cannot attack the true body, but the moment you attack me, hundreds of millions of time and space collapse, which is equivalent to your own annihilation of your own attack, so you can't hurt me. When you can only hurt me with one blow, but not others, then you can hope to hurt me!

Selfless True Ancestor said.

"Selfless True Ancestor, you can make a move, let me see your strength!"

Black Emperor Ancestor Dao.

"Good!

The Selfless True Ancestor made a move, and pointed lightly, this finger seemed to be very ordinary, but the Black Emperor Ancestor's expression changed drastically, and he did his best to urge a defense top origin master.

However, one finger shattered, and then even the primordial golden light on the Black Emperor Ancestor's body shattered, and his entire body directly collapsed and flew out.

Of course, this finger only shattered his primordial golden light, and did not hurt him.

But what about the next finger?

"I'm defeated!"

The Black Emperor Ancestor didn't try anymore and directly admitted defeat.

It was clear that he was no match for the Selfless True Ancestor.

At this moment, he knew that these great beings who had already surpassed the Ten Realms level had already surpassed them, and all of them were extremely powerful and had their own hole cards.

Therefore, he has nothing to be proud of.

"Okay, I've agreed to exchange my cultivation experience!" said the Black Emperor Ancestor.

Subsequently, the Black Emperor Ancestor and the Ten Elements Ancestor shared their experiences respectively, and the Black Emperor Ancestor also told his discoveries one by one.

"Curse the Black Stone, the White Stone of Life, I didn't expect that these two treasures could help break the shackles of the primordial control body, and if the shackles and chains continue to be broken, there should be hope to surpass the primordial control body and step into another level. "

Realm Ancestor exclaimed.

"This time, the Black Emperor Ancestor has contributed a lot, and in order to make up for your losses, we will give some of the special resources under our control to the Black Emperor Ancestor!" the Primordial Ancestor proposed.

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

"I agree!"

The Ten Elements Ancestors said one after another.

These great beings who had transcended the Ten Realms had almost mastered many resources of the Origin Realm Sea, and even the resources near the end of the Realm that were useful to them were occupied by them.

Now, as soon as the Black Emperor Ancestor breaks through, he can obtain a part of the resources, which is naturally a good thing.

"Thank you!

The Black Emperor Controller thanked.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

The Ten Elements Ancestor sent a message to all the personal disciples and official disciples.

Ye Tian came to Wanyuan Mountain as soon as possible.

The Snow Maiden Controller, the Black Decay Controller, the Jiang You Controller, and the Ancient Demon Controller all came to Wanyuan Mountain one by one.

They were also very curious, what did the master call them to do this time?

Soon, many disciples met the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"I've seen Shizun!"

The disciples said respectfully.

"Sit!"

Ten Xingzu said.

At this time, many disciples sat on the futon one by one, waiting for the Ten Elements Ancestor to explain the matter.

"You should know that the Black Emperor Ancestor has surpassed the Ten Realm-level Masters, and he has discovered the Third Path!" said the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Everyone was shocked, they naturally knew that the third path that the Ten Elements Ancestor said must be the change of their own path, and the two ways to improve their strength by opening up the Boundary River were also the two paths that the Eight Realm-level controllers had to take in order to attack the Ten Realm-level controllers.

Otherwise, they would not be able to attack the Ten Realm-level masters.

But now, the third way has come out.

"Master, did the Black Emperor Controller use the Third Path to break the shackles and surpass the Ten Realm-level Controllers?" asked the Black Decay Controller.

"Yes!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded slightly.

At this time, the Black Rotten Controller was completely stimulated.

He thought that his strength surpassed that of the Black Emperor Ancestor, and he had always been stronger than the other party, but the other party quietly discovered the third way, and used this to break the shackles, surpass the Ten Realm-level controllers, and compare with his own master.

The Ten Elements Ancestor looked at the Black Decay Controller and said, "Black Decay, don't worry too much, being able to discover the third path does not mean that his talent is stronger than yours, it can only be said that he is lucky." Moreover, I have obtained the method of practicing the third path, and now I am teaching it to you, and you can practice it too. Of course, if you want to take the third path, you must first master the primordial-level control body!"

"What, you have to master the primordial mastery body?"

Many disciples felt despair, they had no hope of condensing a primordial-level control body at all!

Even some disciples didn't even know what the primordial-level control body was, and after other disciples told it, they understood.

But even then, there was no hope for them.

However, Ye Tian and the Snow Maiden were very excited, which meant that they could now practice the third path.

But Senior Brother Jiang You sighed, he condensed the will of the Transformation Realm, but he did not condense the primordial-level control body, and absorbed the origin of the Origin Realm Sea in advance, and wanted to continue to condense the primordial-level control body, there was almost no hope.

Therefore, this time the third path has nothing to do with him.

At this moment, the Ten Elements Ancestor took out the Curse Black Stone and the Life White Stone.

Subsequently, the Ten Elements Ancestor demonstrated on the spot how to use these two treasures to stimulate the primordial-level control body and break the shackles and chains.

"According to the results of our deduction, if the extreme strength of the Ten Realm-level Controllers breaks the thirty-six shackles, there is hope to surpass the Ten Realm-level Controllers. Of course, the first Black Emperor to discover this path will have an easier time breaking the shackles and chains, but it will be dozens or even hundreds of times more difficult for you to break the shackles and chains in the future. "

Ten Xingzu said.

"Curse the Black Stone, it seems that the mysterious controller who collected a large number of Cursed Black Stones at the auction is the Black Emperor Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
